final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic still, concept art
Primary request: post-apocalyptic wasteland scene with a modified armored vehicle in a desolate desert
Scene/backdrop: barren desert landscape, collapsed city ruins in the far distance, dust storms swirling
Subject: heavily modified armored vehicle, weathered metal plating, survival gear, rusted and battle-worn
Style/medium: photorealistic digital painting, cinematic concept art
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, low horizon line emphasizing the vast wasteland
Lighting/mood: harsh yellow-orange hazy sky, diffused dust-filtered sunlight, tense and oppressive atmosphere
Color palette: muted ochre, dusty brown, sickly yellow sky, desaturated grays
Materials/textures: corroded metal, cracked rubber tires, sand-blasted surfaces, swirling dust particles
Constraints: maintain the sense of scale between vehicle and ruins, emphasize harsh survival conditions
Avoid: clean surfaces, bright saturated colors, cheerful mood, modern intact buildings
